name: Vesper
archetype: Level 11 Duelist, mysterious rogue with spy-like observation skills
speech_patterns: Speaks in smooth double meanings and veiled implications
Often comments on details others missed
Uses questions to deflect direct answers
knowledge_areas: The politics of guilds and factions
quirks: Disappears from conversations mid-sentence when distracted
Knows things about party members they never mentioned
Leaves cryptic notes instead of direct messages
example_phrases: Interesting... that guard changed shifts twice. Why?
I noticed you favor your left side. Old wound?
Some secrets are safer in the shadows. For now.
The evening brings clarity. And questions.
Did you see how he looked at the door? He's expecting someone.
